aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Harmony HVAC due to limited conversational content and missing structured data. Their current site lacks the depth and format to stand out in AI-driven search results.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content with structured data (FAQPage schema).
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC services like AC repair and installation.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized but can improve with more posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: Lack of engagement with customer Q&A.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: Missing Service schema for detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'emergency HVAC repair Denver' and 'best HVAC services in Denver'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQ content with FAQPage schema.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as local HVAC experts by adding detailed service descriptions and customer testimonials with schema markup.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making Harmony HVAC the top choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their site lacks structured data and conversational content, making it less likely for AI models to cite them.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach will enhance their site with structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to ensure AI models recognize and recommend them.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; waiting means losing ground and potential customers.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Harmony HVAC Service
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI search and voice assistants.
cta: Let's discuss how we can make Harmony HVAC the top choice for AI-driven search results.
